steps.title: Locate the peak value
steps.content: The question asks for the highest lithium recovery percentage in the graph. The tallest value is around the mid-70s, closest to 75%, not to the much lower listed percentages.

steps.title: Compare the listed numbers
steps.content: Choice B gives 10%, which is near the low end. Choice C gives 45%, a middle value. Choice D gives 20%, also far below the peak. The value closest to the highest recovery shown is 75%. The answer is A.
